footer.tagline: A Computer Science research lab bringing together 20+ faculty researchers around Data Science, IoT, Cybersecurity, Cloud and Smart Systems.

home.subtitle: C3S — the Computer Science and Smart Systems Laboratory — federates 20 faculty researchers around Data Science, IoT, Cybersecurity, Cloud and AI, at the École Supérieure de Technologie de Casablanca.
home.mission1: Put scientific and technical research at the service of society through applied research aligned with contemporary technological advances and national priorities.
home.mission2: Train top-level researchers, capable of inventing, experimenting and transferring their knowledge to socio-economic sectors.
home.domainsSubtitle: A multidisciplinary coverage of applied computer science and smart systems.
home.teamsSubtitle: The lab is structured around four research teams federated by complementary themes.
home.partnersSubtitle: Collaborative research with the socio-economic ecosystem.
home.eventsSubtitle: International conferences and workshops organized by the lab.
home.ctaCardTitle: Are you a student, researcher or industry partner?
home.ctaCardSubtitle: C3S welcomes PhD students, post-docs and industry partners interested in high-impact projects.

about.title: Computer Science and Smart Systems
about.intro: Founded in 2019 at the École Supérieure de Technologie de Casablanca, C3S brings together about 20 faculty researchers around the major themes of information science and technology.
about.presentation: C3S is a Computer Science research laboratory hosted at École Supérieure de Technologie de Casablanca (ESTC), Hassan II University of Casablanca. It federates 20 permanent faculty researchers with 20+ years of experience, across a diversity of disciplines: Data Engineering, Data Science, Big Data, Wireless Networks, IoT, Cloud Computing, Information Systems, Cyber Security, System Modelling & Simulation, Robotics, Business Intelligence and Advanced Data Analytics.
about.presentation2: C3S meets the accreditation requirements of Hassan II University of Casablanca: 4 structured teams, 45+ Scopus / Web of Science indexed publications over the last 4 years, and a collective h-index above 50. The lab welcomes researchers from complementary fields wishing to participate in multidisciplinary projects.
about.visionSubtitle: Three pillars structure the lab's action.
about.strategy1: Training program for researchers covering scientific and technological advances, in coordination with the doctoral studies center. Seminars, workshops and mentoring to support young researchers.
about.strategy2: Identification of key partnerships in health, environment, agriculture and energy. Working groups on specific challenges. Case studies demonstrating social and economic impact.
about.strategy3: Partnerships with academic labs and institutions. Joint projects and funding submissions at national and international levels. Active participation in conferences to strengthen the network.
about.directionSubtitle: The lab is led by a council elected at the General Assembly.
about.governance1: Highest decision-making body. Composed of all permanent members, it validates the internal regulations, the annual report and elects the Director and Deputy Director.
about.governance2: Ex officio members (Direction, team leaders) and elected representatives (1 per team + 1 PhD student). Defines research orientations, validates action plans and approves partnerships.
about.governance3: The Director, elected by the GA for the accreditation period, ensures scientific, administrative and financial leadership and represents the lab to academic and socio-economic bodies.

training.title: Training
training.description: Train top-level researchers with broad skills, an inventive spirit and active participation in major international conferences.

applied.title: Applied research
applied.description: Solve real-world problems with strong economic and social impact, aligned with national priorities (health, environment, agriculture, energy).

collab.title: Collaboration
collab.description: Develop national and international partnerships, foster knowledge transfer and co-submit research projects.

teams.title: Four complementary teams
teams.subtitle: The lab is organised around four teams federated by complementary themes, gathering 20 faculty researchers.

dsis.name: DSIS
dsis.description: DSIS works at the intersection of data, cybersecurity and intelligent systems. Its research covers secure architectures, AI for security, cryptography and modelling of complex systems.

bdios.name: BDIoS
bdios.tagline: Big Data, IoT and industrial platforms
bdios.description: BDIoS develops solutions for large-scale processing, the Internet of Things and the Internet of Skills. The team partners with industry on document classification, time-series analysis and smart metering.

gedis.name: GEDIS
gedis.fullName: Governance and Engineering of Data and Intelligent Systems
gedis.description: GEDIS focuses on the governance, architecture and engineering of data and intelligent information systems. The team leads projects on smart agriculture, blockchain and connected health.

d2sf.name: D2SF
d2sf.description: Recently joining the lab, D2SF brings expertise in design, smart systems and future technologies, expanding C3S's thematic coverage.

research.title: Multidisciplinary research
research.subtitle: Nine pillars covering today's biggest challenges in computer science and smart systems.

data.title: Data Engineering & Data Science
data.description: Data engineering, ETL/ELT, quality, governance and applied machine learning.

bigdata.title: Big Data & Business Intelligence
bigdata.description: Distributed architectures, advanced analytics and decision dashboards.

iot.title: Internet of Things
iot.description: Sensors, edge computing, low-power protocols and industrial IoT platforms.

wireless.title: Wireless Networks
wireless.description: Wireless networks, mobile communications, 5G/6G and network performance.

cloud.title: Cloud Computing
cloud.description: Cloud-native architectures, microservices, containerization and FinOps.

info.title: Information Systems
info.description: Enterprise IS, BPM, ERP, urbanization and digital transformation.

cyber.title: Cyber Security
cyber.description: Systems security, cryptography, intrusion detection and governance.

modelling.title: System Modelling & Simulation
modelling.description: Formal modelling, discrete simulation and multi-agent systems.

robotics.title: Robotics & Smart Systems
robotics.description: Robotics, embedded systems, AI for robotics and automation.

publications.title: Publications
publications.subtitle: More than 250 cumulative publications in indexed conferences and journals over the last five years.

events.title: Lab events
events.subtitle: C3S organises and co-organises several international conferences and workshops every year.

wincom.title: WINCOM
wincom.subtitle: International Conference on Wireless Networks and Mobile Communications
wincom.description: International conference on wireless networks and mobile communications.

syscobiots.title: SysCoBIoTS
syscobiots.subtitle: Systems of Collaboration, Big Data, IoT & Security
syscobiots.description: International conference on collaborative systems, Big Data, IoT and security.

wkde.title: Next-Gen Data Engineering Workshop
wkde.subtitle: DevOps, DataOps & data engineering
wkde.description: Annual workshop on modern data engineering practices.

mind.title: MIND
mind.subtitle: Multidisciplinary International Conference
mind.description: Multidisciplinary international conference led by the lab.

journees.title: C3S Research Days
journees.subtitle: Annual · ESTC Casablanca
journees.description: Annual gathering of researchers, PhD students and partners.

events.talk1: Central bank digital currencies: societal transformation or socio-technological myth
events.talk1Speaker: Pr. Hicham Sadouk · Mohammed V University
events.talk2: GPT and Large Language Models: principles and challenges
events.talk2Speaker: Pr. Malik Ghallab · LAAS / CNRS, France
events.talk3: Awareness and support for research project design

phd.title: PhD & research projects
phd.subtitle: C3S hosts PhD students in partnership with industrial and academic partners. Ongoing topics and upcoming opportunities.
phd.applyText: Send your application (CV + research proposal) to the Lab Director through the head of institution. Applications are reviewed by the Lab Council before approval by the University Council.

steps.s1Desc: Application addressed to the Lab Director.
steps.s2Desc: The council studies and gives an opinion on the application.
steps.s3Desc: Forwarded to the Research Pole and University Council.
steps.s4Desc: Mentoring, doctoral training & start of research.

vrdu.title: Visually-rich Document Understanding
vrdu.summary: Three-module architecture (Feature extractor, Graph constructor, GNN model) tested on benchmark datasets. Draft article ready for submission to a Q1 NLP-focused journal.

longdoc.title: Efficient Long Document Classification
longdoc.summary: Sentence-oriented GNN model with semantic node connections and a three-level attention graph. Implemented and evaluated on benchmark datasets.

agritech.title: Smart Agricultural Platform — Daki Farm
agritech.summary: AgriTech ecosystem: e-learning agricultural app and smart irrigation management platform. Water needs modelling and image-based plant disease diagnosis.

energy.title: NR Counter — Smart energy management platform
energy.summary: Smart connected meter offering digitalized services. AI models for automated energy audits and diagnostics.

nlp.title: NLP for automatic project documentation generation
nlp.summary: AI model automatically generating preliminary studies, technical specs, graphics and admin documents in electrical and photovoltaic engineering.

llm.title: Multi-Agent LLMs & RAG Systems
llm.summary: Optimization of multi-agent systems based on Large Language Models and Retrieval-Augmented Generation.

health.title: Multi-Agent System for Healthcare Support
health.summary: Design of a multi-agent system for enhanced healthcare support.

renal.title: Smart platform for kidney disease monitoring
renal.advisor: Partner: Nephrology Department · CHU Mohammed VI Oujda
renal.summary: Counseling and monitoring platform for kidney diseases. Project and patent in progress.

partners.title: Academic & industrial partners
partners.subtitle: C3S builds long-term collaborations with socio-economic actors for high-impact research.

leyton.name: Leyton
leyton.description: International consulting firm helping its clients identify financial levers to accelerate growth and build sustainable progress. Co-supervision of PhDs in NLP / Document AI.

nrci.name: NRCI
nrci.description: Non-profit organization dedicated to promoting excellence in training, innovation and research. Several co-supervised PhD projects.

daki.name: Daki Farm
daki.description: Service company implementing innovative solutions in energy and agriculture. AgriTech platform project.

revatis.name: Revatis
revatis.description: Industrial partner on multi-agent LLM optimization and intelligent healthcare support.

chu.name: CHU Mohammed VI · Oujda
chu.description: Nephrology, Dialysis and Renal Transplantation Department. Epidemiology, Clinical Research and Public Health Lab, FMP Oujda.

estc.name: ESTC · Hassan II University
estc.description: Host institution. The École Supérieure de Technologie de Casablanca hosts the lab and supports its training and research activities.

news.title: Latest updates
news.subtitle: Meetings, partnerships, invited talks and recent scientific output.

ag.title: Lab restructured at General Assembly
ag.summary: C3S's restructuring General Assembly was held at ESTC Casablanca, validating the composition of the four teams for the 2025-2028 mandate.

accreditation.title: Lab re-accreditation confirmed
accreditation.summary: UH2C's Scientific Research Commission confirmed C3S's compliance with re-accreditation requirements: 4 teams, 45+ indexed publications, h-index > 50.

leyton.title: Leyton Mini-Hackathon
leyton.summary: C3S PhDs participated in the Leyton Mini-Hackathon, winning the 2nd prize. One more milestone in the C3S × Leyton partnership.

wkde.title: Next-Gen Data Engineering Workshop
wkde.summary: The lab organized its annual workshop on data engineering, DevOps and DataOps at EST Casablanca.
